lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar antarajaamee |
lines.english: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is in all places and interspaces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਗਣਤ ਮਿਟਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: simar simar pooran paramesur chintaa ganat mittaaee he |8|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Perfect Transcendent Lord, I am rid of all anxieties and calculations. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਧਨੁ ਤਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jas keeratan sang dhan taahaa |
lines.english: The wealth of the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਕੋਟਿ ਲਖ ਬਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam kott lakh baahaa |
lines.english: One who has the Name of the Lord has hundreds of thousands and millions of arms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਖੜਗੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦੀਨਾ ਦੂਤ ਮਾਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਧਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: giaan kharrag kar kirapaa deenaa doot maare kar dhaaee he |9|
lines.english: In His Mercy, God has blessed me with the sword of spiritual wisdom; I have attacked and killed the demons. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਤਿ ਆਵਹੁ ਵਸਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਅਪਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeet aavahu vasahu ghar apane |
lines.english: Be a winner of the game of life and come to abide in your true home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa jaap japahu jap japane |
lines.english: Chant the Chant of the Lord, the Chant of Chants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਨਰਕ ਨ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh narak na dekhahu rasak rasak gun gaaee he |10|
lines.english: You shall not see the 8.4 million types of hell; sing His Glorious Praises and remain saturated with loving devotion||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਅਥਾਹ ਅਗੰਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aooch athaah agam apaaraa |
lines.english: He is lofty, unfathomable, inaccessible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਉਧਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: khandd brahamandd udhaaranahaaraa |
lines.english: He is the Savior of worlds and galaxies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜਿ ਲੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan torr lee prabh mole |
lines.english: God has broken my bonds, and claimed me as His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨੀ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare prabh apanee so jan tiseh dhiaaee he |11|
lines.english: That humble being, unto whom God grants His Grace, meditates on Him. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕੀਨੇ ਘਰ ਗੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa keene ghar gole |
lines.english: In His Mercy, He has made me the slave of His home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਰੁਣ ਝੁਣਕਾਰੁ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: anahad run jhunakaar sehaj dhun saachee kaar kamaaee he |12|
lines.english: The unstruck celestial sound current resounds and vibrates, when one performs acts of true service. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਬਨੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: man parateet banee prabh teree |
lines.english: O God, I have enshrined faith in You within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪਨੈ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੋਭ ਸੁਹਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: angeekaar keea prabh apanai jag meh sobh suhaaee he |13|
lines.english: God has made me His own, and now I have a glorious reputation in this world. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: binas gee haumai mat meree |
lines.english: My egotistical intellect has been driven out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਈਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: bal bal jaaee prabh apune eesai |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to my Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜਗਦੀਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar japahu jagadeesai |
lines.english: Proclaim His Glorious Victory, and meditate on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਏਕਾ ਜਗਤਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: tis bin doojaa avar na deesai ekaa jagat sabaaee he |14|
lines.english: I do not see any other except Him. The One Lord pervades the whole world. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad sadaa man raataa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, my mind is attuned to Him forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sat sat sat prabh jaataa |
lines.english: True, True, True is God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kaa preetam piaaraa |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is the Beloved of His humble devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਏਕੰਕਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: simar simar jeeveh jan tere ekankaar samaaee he |15|
lines.english: Your humble servants live by meditating, meditating in remembrance on You, merging in You, O One Universal Creator. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੈ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabhai udhaaran khasam hamaaraa |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is the Savior of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਸਭ ਇਛਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੧॥
lines.translit: simar naam punee sabh ichhaa jan naanak paij rakhaaee he |16|1|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all desires are fulfilled. He has saved the honor of servant Nanak. ||16||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਸੋਲਹੇ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo solahe mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Solahas, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗੀ ਜੋਗੀ ਨਾਰਿ ਲਪਟਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sangee jogee naar lapattaanee |
lines.english: The body-bride is attached to the Yogi, the husband-soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਝਿ ਰਹੀ ਰੰਗ ਰਸ ਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aurajh rahee rang ras maanee |
lines.english: She is involved with him, enjoying pleasure and delights.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤ ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਭਏ ਇਕਤ੍ਰਾ ਕਰਤੇ ਭੋਗ ਬਿਲਾਸਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kirat sanjogee bhe ikatraa karate bhog bilaasaa he |1|
lines.english: As a consequence of past actions, they have come together, enjoying pleasurable play. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਧਨਹਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ਰਖੈ ਸੰਗਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: pir dhaneh seegaar rakhai sangaanai |
lines.english: The husband adorns his bride, and keeps her with himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਏਕਤ੍ਰ ਵਸਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਦੇ ਧਨਹਿ ਦਿਲਾਸਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mil ekatr vaseh din raatee priau de dhaneh dilaasaa he |2|
lines.english: Joining together, they live in harmony day and night; the husband comforts his wife. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਧਨ ਤਤੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo pir karai su dhan tat maanai |
lines.english: Whatever the husband does, the bride willingly accepts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਆਣਿ ਦਿਖਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo paavai so aan dikhaavai |
lines.english: Whatever he finds, he brings to show his bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਮਾਗੈ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhan maagai priau bahu bidh dhaavai |
lines.english: When the bride asks, the husband runs around in all sorts of ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਨਉ ਦੋਊ ਕਰ ਜੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhan karai binau doaoo kar jorai |
lines.english: With her palms pressed together, the bride offers her prayer,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਵਸਤੁ ਕਉ ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਧਨ ਰਹਤੀ ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ek vasat kau pahuch na saakai dhan rahatee bhookh piaasaa he |3|
lines.english: But there is one thing he cannot reach, and so his bride remains hungry and thirsty. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪਰਦੇਸਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੁ ਵਸਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਮੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: pria parades na jaahu vasahu ghar morai |
lines.english: "O my beloved, do not leave me and go to foreign lands; please stay here with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਬਣਜੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aisaa banaj karahu grih bheetar jit utarai bhookh piaasaa he |4|
lines.english: Do such business within our home, that my hunger and thirst may be relieved." ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਜੁਗ ਸਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagale karam dharam jug saadhaa |
lines.english: All sorts of religious rituals are performed in this age,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin har ras sukh til nahee laadhaa |
lines.english: but without the sublime essence of the Lord, not an iota of peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਈ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਸੰਗੇ ਤਉ ਧਨ ਪਿਰ ਅਨੰਦ ਉਲਾਸਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bhee kripaa naanak satasange tau dhan pir anand ulaasaa he |5|
lines.english: When the Lord becomes Merciful, O Nanak, then in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, the bride and the husband enjoy ecstasy and bliss. ||5||
